validation.check_value.text: Check that value and try again.

validation.range_reversed.text: The start date needs to be on or before the end date.

validation.signature_type_required.text: Tell us which kind of signature this is and try again.

connection.credential_rejected.text: That key didn't work — double-check it and try again.

connection.connector_unavailable_detail.text: API-key sync isn't turned on in this build. Upload an activity file to bring in your rides instead.

connection.key_archetype_only.text: This source isn't connected with a key.

connection.credential_storage_disabled.text: Credential storage is disabled until an encryption root key is configured.

connection.credential_storage_disabled_d.text: Configure WATTWISE_ENCRYPTION_ROOT_KEY and restart before connecting sources that store API keys. File upload/import still works without credential storage.

validation.default_tier_not_allowed.text: Pick a default tier that is also one of the allowed tiers.
